title: International affairs and the environment - Canada.ca
content:
## International affairs and the environment
There are few major environmental issues for which we can find causes or solutions solely within Canadian borders. Canada needs to cooperate effectively with other nations whose policies and activities affect the quality of our environment, and to find effective solutions to global environmental challenges. Canada also has international environmental obligations under various agreements and fora. The international dimension of Environment and Climate Change Canada's work is important to achieve Canada's international and domestic goals.
- Key issues : international affairs
- Environmental partnerships with countries and regions
- Partnerships with international organizations
- Participation in international environmental agreements
- Canadians appointed to environment international advisory committees
- The China Council: global climate change cooperation
- Canada-United States-Mexico Agreement (CUSMA) - Environment chapter
